summary: Checked-in executable literature workflow authority: recipes + session protocol + launcher-backed consumers.

install.claude_code: Consume the checked-in meta/recipes and session protocol through the checked-in `packages/literature-workflows` launcher; do not recreate generic workflow authority inside provider-specific MCP facades.
install.codex: Consume the checked-in meta/recipes and session protocol through the checked-in `packages/literature-workflows` launcher; keep workflow authority above atomic MCP tools.
install.opencode: Consume the checked-in meta/recipes and session protocol through the checked-in `packages/literature-workflows` launcher; keep workflow authority in the workflow-pack layer.
